Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CLIFFORD A. CHANLER, Esq. of Chanler, LLC (Tel: 203-594-9246) for plaintiff;
Atty. BRETT H. OBERST, Esq. of Doll Amir & Eley LLP (Tel: 213-542-3380) for defendant Amazon.com, Inc.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Questions 2 And 3.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling but will take under submission only the issue of the deadline for defendant to respond to discovery.

The Court will review the proposed order submission by plaintiff.

If the parties have a stipulated protective order they would like the Court to sign, they may email it to the pro tem judge at rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Question 1; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. CLIFFORD A. CHANLER, Esq. of Chanler, LLC (Tel: 203-594-9246) for plaintiff;
Atty. BRETT H. OBERST, Esq. of Doll Amir & Eley LLP (Tel: 213-542-3380) for defendant Amazon.com, Inc.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One, Questions 2 And 3.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES FROM DEFENDANT TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORY, SET ONE, NO. 1 IS GRANTED AS SET FORTH BELOW:
(1) DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO INTERROGATORY NO. 1 ARE OVERRULED.
(2) WITHIN THIRTY (30) DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, DEFENDANT WILL PROVIDE PLAINTIFF, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, FULL AND COMPLETE VERIFIED RESPONSES LIMITED TO PRODUCT AS DEFINED BY PLAINTIFF SOLD WITHIN ONE YEAR PRECEEDING THE AUGUST 8, 2020 NOTICE AND OCTOBER 2020 NOTICE WITHIN THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA,
(3) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE NO MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINTS EITHER PARTY.

The Court will sign the proposed order submitted by plaintiff.

If the parties have a stipulated protective order they would like the Court to sign, they may email it to the pro tem judge at rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
